description: Use Case 1 golden set — expected category, hand, and department after full pipeline.

cases.description: Google Chrome spins forever on any website. Other apps have internet. Started after a Windows update this morning.

cases.title: Docker hypervisor
cases.description: Docker Desktop failing to start / Hypervisor error. Hardware-assisted virtualization must be enabled in the BIOS. It worked fine yesterday before the system security policy updates ran overnight.

cases.title: SQL null values
cases.description: SQL query returns null values in production database table after migration
